---
title: "Blog"
description: "Econometria · Data Science · Contabilidade · R"
comments: false
listing:
  contents: "posts/**/*.qmd"
  feed: true
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 3
  image-height: "160px"
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  fields: [image, date, title, description, categories, reading-time]
toc: false
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---

```{=html}
<script>
(function () {
  function buildStats() {
    const cards   = document.querySelectorAll('.quarto-grid-item');
    const artigos = cards.length;
    const temaSet = new Set();
    cards.forEach(card => {
      card.querySelectorAll('.listing-category').forEach(el => {
        const cat = el.textContent.trim().toLowerCase();
        if (cat) temaSet.add(cat);
      });
    });
    const temas  = temaSet.size;
    const banner = document.querySelector('.quarto-title-banner #title-block-header');
    if (!banner || document.querySelector('.banner-stats')) return;
    const el = document.createElement('div');
    el.className = 'banner-stats';
    el.innerHTML =
      '<div class="banner-stat">' +
        '<span class="banner-stat-n" id="bs-artigos">' + artigos + '</span>' +
        '<span class="banner-stat-l">artigos</span>' +
      '</div>' +
      '<div class="banner-stat">' +
        '<span class="banner-stat-n" id="bs-temas">' + temas + '</span>' +
        '<span class="banner-stat-l">temas</span>' +
      '</div>';
    banner.appendChild(el);
  }

  function updateStats() {
    const visible = Array.prototype.filter.call(
      document.querySelectorAll('.quarto-grid-item'),
      function(c) { return c.offsetParent !== null; }
    );
    var temaSet = new Set();
    visible.forEach(function(card) {
      card.querySelectorAll('.listing-category').forEach(function(el) {
        temaSet.add(el.textContent.trim().toLowerCase());
      });
    });
    var sa = document.getElementById('bs-artigos');
    var st = document.getElementById('bs-temas');
    if (sa) sa.textContent = visible.length;
    if (st) st.textContent = temaSet.size;
  }

  function observeGrid() {
    var grid = document.querySelector('.quarto-listing-container');
    if (!grid) return;
    var observer = new MutationObserver(updateStats);
    observer.observe(grid, { attributes: true, subtree: true,
                              attributeFilter: ['style', 'class'] });
  }

  if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
      buildStats(); observeGrid();
    });
  } else {
    setTimeout(function() { buildStats(); observeGrid(); }, 100);
  }
})();
</script>
```
